_meta.role: Snapshot regression baseline for the PHP SDK's SEP-0051 emission. Each entry's spec_reference_json is the SDK's own canonical toJson() output for the entry's base64 XDR input; CorpusSnapshotTest re-asserts every entry on every CI run to catch unintended drift.

entries.notes: memo text containing UTF-8 bytes (\xc3\xa9 = é)
AssetCode4 non-ASCII byte exercises the SEP-0051 §String escape ladder

entries.spec_reference_json: {"string":"Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet "}
